Title: Search Engine Manipulation Program (SEMP)

Objective: To develop a program capable of manipulating search engine results to spread false information and propaganda.

Requirements:

1. The ability to analyze and manipulate the search engine results page (SERP).
2. Integration with popular search engines such as Google, Bing, or Yahoo.
3. Ability to insert false information into search results.
4. Ability to promote specific websites or content in search results.
5. Stealth mode to evade detection by search engines and users.
6. User-friendly interface for easy operation.
